scripts.benchmark:hosted: pnpm --silent run benchmark:compile 1>&2 && node dist/benchmark/runner/cli.js hosted
scripts.benchmark:local: pnpm --silent run build 1>&2 && pnpm --silent run benchmark:compile 1>&2 && node dist/benchmark/runner/cli.js local
scripts.benchmark:sandbox: pnpm --silent run benchmark:compile 1>&2 && node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local dist/benchmark/runner/cli.js sandbox
